parameters.subject: =Kindle Manuscript Ready: {{ $json.project_title }}
parameters.message:
=

Your Kindle Manuscript is Ready

Your formatted manuscript has been created as two Google Docs:

{{ $json.docs[0].doc_title }} ({{ $json.docs[0].chapters_count }} chapters)

{{ $json.docs[1].doc_title }} ({{ $json.docs[1].chapters_count }} chapters)

  • Total Chapters: {{ $json.total_chapters }}
  • Trim Size: {{ $json.page_size }}

From Google Docs you can:

  • Download as .docx for KDP upload (File → Download → Microsoft Word)
  • Download as PDF for review (File → Download → PDF)
  • Edit formatting, fonts, and styles directly

Command: {{ $json.user_prompt }}

assignments.name: result
assignments.value: =Kindle manuscript created as 2 Google Docs: {{ $json.project_title }} ({{ $json.total_chapters }} chapters). Part 1: https://docs.google.com/document/d/{{ $json.docs[0].documentId }}/edit Part 2: https://docs.google.com/document/d/{{ $json.docs[1].documentId }}/edit Emailed to {{ $json.recipient_email }}.
